notes.introduction: An exposition of Acts 14:25-28 on the return of Paul and Barnabas to the church at Antioch after the first missionary journey, used as a framework for examining the local church's role in missions. Draws on Acts 8 and Acts 13-14 to trace the spread of the gospel through Galatia and the reporting of that work back to the sending church.

sections.heading: Scattering and Spreading of the Gospel in Acts 8
